text:
OVERVIEW OF THE PLATFORM INNOVATION KIT 5.0
four major components helping you to build digital platforms & ecosystems the right way
Double Loop
Framework
A framework to Discover and Scale a
viable platform business
Sustainability by Design
Circular economy and sustainability
aspects are incorporated into the
canvases to support you to design
for a better tomorrow by default
Core Canvases
A full set of canvases to design &
validate each component of your
platform business model
Advanced Tools (€)
Special tools developed for deep-
dives into elementary topics like
network effects, trust or data
POWERED BY
aws
• PLATFORM
NOVATION KIT
